tool.name: polyglot_generator
tool.description: Generate polyglot payloads for multi-context exploitation.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Generate XSS polyglots working in multiple contexts - Generate SQL injection polyglots for different DBMS - Generate SSTI polyglots for template engines - Generate command injection polyglots - Test multiple vulnerability types simultaneously

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The generation action: - generate: Generate polyglot payloads for specified type - list_types: List all available polyglot types - custom: Generate custom polyglot from template

parameter.name: payload_type
parameter.description: Type of polyglot: xss_basic, xss_advanced, sqli_basic, sqli_union, ssti_basic, ssti_advanced, command_injection, xxe_basic, path_traversal, ldap_injection, nosql_injection, multi_context. Required for generate.

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: Optional encoding to apply: url, double_url, html, base64, unicode

parameter.name: custom_template
parameter.description: Custom payload template for custom action

returns.description: Generated polyglot payloads with descriptions and usage tips

tool.examples:
# Generate XSS polyglots
generate xss_basic
# Generate with URL encoding
generate sqli_basic url
# List available types
list_types
# Custom polyglot
custom ' OR '1'='1--
